news.title:
Mid-tier IT firms like Coforge, LTIMindtree, and Zensar secure AI-led large contracts, highlighting rising demand for digital transformation.
Deals include Zensar's $210M financial services contract and LTIMindtree's $100M European medical tech project, emphasizing AI-driven innovation.
news.summary:
Mid-tier IT firms like Coforge, LTIMindtree, and Zensar secure AI-led large contracts, highlighting rising demand for digital transformation.
Deals include Zensar's $210M financial services contract and LTIMindtree's $100M European medical tech project, emphasizing AI-driven innovation.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies received an ESG rating of 80 (Leader) from NSE Sustainability Ratings.
The rating was independently prepared using public domain information for FY2024-25 disclosures.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies received an ESG rating of 80 (Leader) from NSE Sustainability Ratings.
The rating was independently prepared using public domain information for FY2024-25 disclosures.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies secured a $210M deal over 5.5 years with a major financial player.
The deal focuses on AI-led automation, efficiency, and enterprise technical services.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies secured a $210M deal over 5.5 years with a major financial player.
The deal focuses on AI-led automation, efficiency, and enterprise technical services.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies released its Q3 FY26 earnings call transcript on its website.
The call, held on Jan 23, 2026, discussed financial results for Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies released its Q3 FY26 earnings call transcript on its website.
The call, held on Jan 23, 2026, discussed financial results for Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Zensar faces revenue decline as Cisco, one of its top clients, reduces IT vendor partnerships and discretionary spending.
Peers like Hexaware, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, and Sonata also face client pressures, highlighting risks for mid-tier IT firms.
news.summary:
Zensar faces revenue decline as Cisco, one of its top clients, reduces IT vendor partnerships and discretionary spending.
Peers like Hexaware, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, and Sonata also face client pressures, highlighting risks for mid-tier IT firms.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies held its Q3 FY26 earnings call on Jan 23, 2026.
The call, hosted by HDFC Securities, shared financial performance and future insights.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies held its Q3 FY26 earnings call on Jan 23, 2026.
The call, hosted by HDFC Securities, shared financial performance and future insights.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies reported $160.5M revenue with 2.2% YoY growth in reported currency.
The company also achieved 1.3% YoY growth in constant currency.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies reported $160.5M revenue with 2.2% YoY growth in reported currency.
The company also achieved 1.3% YoY growth in constant currency.

news.title:
Zensar Tech's Q3 revenue rose to ₹7,014M, up from ₹5,592M YoY.
Q3 PBT increased to ₹2,091M; interim dividend declared at ₹2.4/share.
news.summary:
Zensar Tech's Q3 revenue rose to ₹7,014M, up from ₹5,592M YoY.
Q3 PBT increased to ₹2,091M; interim dividend declared at ₹2.4/share.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies' board meeting on Jan 22, 2026, will review Q3 FY25-26 financial results.
The board may declare an interim dividend, with Jan 29, 2026, set as the record date.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies' board meeting on Jan 22, 2026, will review Q3 FY25-26 financial results.
The board may declare an interim dividend, with Jan 29, 2026, set as the record date.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies reported Q2 FY26 revenue of $162.8M, growing 4.2% YoY and 0.5% QoQ in reported currency.
Zensar launched ZenseAI to enhance AI capabilities; 28% of Q2 order bookings were AI-influenced.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies reported Q2 FY26 revenue of $162.8M, growing 4.2% YoY and 0.5% QoQ in reported currency.
Zensar launched ZenseAI to enhance AI capabilities; 28% of Q2 order bookings were AI-influenced.

news.title: Zensar Tech reported a soft Q2, citing stress in telecom, media, and tech sectors.
news.summary: Zensar Tech reported a soft Q2, citing stress in telecom, media, and tech sectors.

news.title:
Zensar targets growth via AI platforms like ZenseAI, focusing on BFSI, healthcare sectors.
Expanding in Europe, Africa; aims mid-teen margins, utilization gains with Gen AI solutions.
news.summary:
Zensar targets growth via AI platforms like ZenseAI, focusing on BFSI, healthcare sectors.
Expanding in Europe, Africa; aims mid-teen margins, utilization gains with Gen AI solutions.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies posted $162.8M revenue, marking 4.2% YoY growth in reported currency.
Constant currency growth for Zensar Technologies stood at 3.4% YoY this quarter.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies posted $162.8M revenue, marking 4.2% YoY growth in reported currency.
Constant currency growth for Zensar Technologies stood at 3.4% YoY this quarter.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies to set up new entity in Brazil, approved by board.
Entity may be a subsidiary or JV; initial capital at face value.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies to set up new entity in Brazil, approved by board.
Entity may be a subsidiary or JV; initial capital at face value.

news.title:
Zensar Tech's Q2 EBIT rose to ₹1.95B from ₹1.9B QoQ.
EBIT margin improved to 13.7% compared to 13.5% QoQ.
news.summary:
Zensar Tech's Q2 EBIT rose to ₹1.95B from ₹1.9B QoQ.
EBIT margin improved to 13.7% compared to 13.5% QoQ.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies schedules Q2FY26 earnings call on Oct 31, 2025 at 9:00 PM IST.
CEO, CFO, and senior management to represent, dial-in details provided for India and international access.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies schedules Q2FY26 earnings call on Oct 31, 2025 at 9:00 PM IST.
